architecture.summary: discoverSkills() called first as primary resolution; hardcoded skills/{name}/SKILL.md only as fallback. checkRepoExists() standalone in github-tree.ts.

integrations.summary: Fail open silently on rate limit like getDefaultBranch. No warnRateLimitOnce needed.

ui-ux.summary: N/A - CLI tool, no UI changes. Error messages are the UX.

performance.summary: N/A - bug fix, no perf impact. discoverSkills already used in 2-part path.

security.summary: Same GITHUB_TOKEN auth pattern as getDefaultBranch.

edge-cases.summary: Discovery empty + hardcoded 404 = standard SKILL.md not found. Non-existent repo = clear error with hint.
